language.label: Language
language.helpText: Choose the language used throughout the Monize interface. Number and date formatting are controlled separately below.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.passwordRequired: Current password is required to change email
profile.passwordConfirmNote: Password confirmation is required when changing your email address.

security.heading: Security
security.ssoNotice: Your account uses Single Sign-On (SSO) for authentication. The password below is not used for login but can be kept as a backup if SSO is disabled.

twoFactor.heading: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.ssoUnavailable: Two-factor authentication is not available for SSO accounts. Authentication security is managed by your identity provider.
twoFactor.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with TOTP verification.
twoFactor.addLayerDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account.

disableModal.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disableModal.description: Enter your current 6-digit code to confirm disabling 2FA.

backupCodes.heading: Backup Codes
backupCodes.description: Use backup codes to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator app.

regenerateModal.title: Regenerate Backup Codes
regenerateModal.description: Enter your current 6-digit code to confirm regenerating backup codes. This will invalidate any existing codes.

trustedDevices.heading: Trusted Devices
trustedDevices.noDevices: No trusted devices. When you check "Don't ask again on this browser" during 2FA login, the device will appear here.

revokeAllModal.title: Revoke All Trusted Devices
revokeAllModal.description: This will remove all trusted devices. You will need to enter your 2FA code on your next login from any device.

preferences.heading: Preferences
preferences.preferredExchangesHelp: Select up to 3 exchanges in priority order. These will be preferred when looking up securities.
preferences.defaultQuoteProviderHelp: Used when a security has no provider override. If the chosen provider fails, Monize automatically tries the other.
preferences.msnNoIntradayNote: Note: MSN Money does not provide intraday quote data, so the 1D / 1W / 1M ranges on the Portfolio Value Over Time chart are unavailable for MSN-tracked holdings.
preferences.msnNotConfigured: MSN is selected as the default quote provider, but MSN_API_KEY is not configured on the server. MSN quotes will fail until an administrator sets the env var and restarts the backend.
preferences.showCreatedAtLabel: Show Create Date in transaction forms
preferences.showCreatedAtTooltip: Displays the date and time a transaction was originally created on transaction forms. This is separate from the transaction date and can help you tell when an entry was actually added to Monize.
preferences.recentTransactionsHelp: Number of entries shown in the history button popover next to the Payee field on transaction forms.

notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.smtpNotConfigured: Email notifications are not available. SMTP has not been configured by the administrator.
notifications.emailNotificationsDescription: Receive email reminders for upcoming bills and budget alerts
notifications.weeklyBudgetDigestDescription: Receive a weekly summary of budget alerts and status
notifications.immediateAlertsNote: Critical budget alerts (over budget, income shortfall) are sent immediately regardless of digest settings.
notifications.sendTestEmailDescription: Send a test email to verify your notifications are working.

toasts.testEmailSent: Test email sent! Check your inbox.

help.heading: Help & Support
help.description: Find documentation, report issues, or join the conversation.

github.label: GitHub
github.description: View the source code and star the project.

openIssue.label: Open an Issue
openIssue.description: Report a bug or request a feature.

discussions.label: Discussions
discussions.description: Ask questions and share ideas with the community.

deleteData.heading: Delete Data
deleteData.description: Remove financial data from your account. This cannot be undone.
deleteData.alwaysDeletedHeading: The following will always be deleted:
deleteData.balanceResetNote: Account balances will be reset to their opening balance.
deleteData.oidcConfirmLabel: Re-authenticate with your identity provider to confirm:

deleteAccount.heading: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

delegateNotice.title: You are a delegate of another account.
delegateNotice.body: Deleting your account will remove your own data, but your login and the shared access others granted you stay so the delegation keeps working. To revoke that access, ask the owner to remove you from their Shared Access list first.

deleteAccount.typeDeleteLabel: Type DELETE to confirm account deletion:

toasts.downgraded: Your own data was removed. Your login and shared access are kept so the delegation stays in place.

errors.passwordRequired: Please enter your password to confirm

apiAccess.heading: API Access
apiAccess.description: Create personal access tokens to connect external AI tools like Claude Desktop via MCP.
apiAccess.mcpServerUrlHelp: Use this URL when configuring MCP clients such as Claude Code or Claude Desktop.
apiAccess.noTokens: No API tokens yet. Create one to get started.

revokeModal.title: Revoke Token
revokeModal.message: This token will immediately stop working. Any MCP connections using it will be disconnected.

createdModal.title: Token Created
createdModal.warningNote: Copy this token now. You won't be able to see it again.

autoBackup.heading: Automatic Backup
autoBackup.description: Automatically back up your data to a folder on a schedule. Since Monize runs in Docker, you must map a host folder into the container as a volume (e.g., -v /host/backups:/backups).
autoBackup.backupTimeHelpInterval: First backup of the day starts at this time ({timezone}). Subsequent backups follow at the configured interval.
autoBackup.backupTimeHelpDaily: Time of day to run the backup in your local timezone ({timezone}).

retention.heading: Retention Policy
retention.description: Configure how many backups to keep. Older backups beyond these limits are automatically deleted.

encryption.heading: Backup Encryption
encryption.descriptionOidc: Encrypt manual and automatic backups with a dedicated backup password you set here. The password is required to restore.
encryption.descriptionLocal: Encrypt manual and automatic backups with your login password. The password is required to restore.

setupModal.descriptionOidc: Choose a password that will be used to encrypt your backups. Save it somewhere safe -- you will need it to restore.
setupModal.descriptionLocal: Confirm your login password. It will be used to encrypt all backups (manual and automatic).

export.heading: Create Backup
export.description: Download a complete backup of your financial data. This includes accounts, transactions, categories, payees, budgets, investments, and all other user data.

exportPasswordModal.title: Encrypt Backup
exportPasswordModal.description: Enter the password to encrypt this backup. You will need it to restore.

restore.heading: Restore from Backup
restore.description: Replace all your current data with data from a previously exported backup file. This will permanently overwrite your existing data.
restore.warning: Warning: This will delete all your current data and replace it with the backup contents. This action cannot be undone.
restore.encryptedBackupLabel: This backup is encrypted. Enter the backup password it was created with:
restore.oidcConfirmLabel: Re-authenticate with your identity provider to confirm:
restore.passwordConfirmLabel: Enter your account password to confirm:

toasts.pleaseEnterPassword: Please enter your password to confirm

restoreResult.title: Restore Complete
restoreResult.description: Your data has been restored successfully. Here is a summary of what was restored:

sharedAccess.description: Delegates sign in with their own credentials and never see your password. They only see the accounts and sections you grant them.
sharedAccess.resetPasswordDisabledTitle: This person manages their own password (they have their own Monize account or delegated access elsewhere).

createModal.title: Add delegate
createModal.description: Grant another person scoped access to your accounts.
createModal.existingAccountNotice: This person already has a Monize login. They'll keep their own credentials and simply be granted the additional shared access — no password or invite needed.
createModal.sendInviteLabel: Send an email invite instead of setting a password

revokeDialog.title: Remove delegate
revokeDialog.message: Remove this delegate? They lose access to your account. If they have no other shared access and never claimed this email as their own Monize account, their owner-managed login is removed too.

tempPasswordModal.title: Temporary password
tempPasswordModal.description: Share this with the delegate securely. They will be asked to change it on first sign in. It will not be shown again.

errors.setPasswordOrInvite: Set a password or send an email invite.

sections.description: Grant read-only access to whole app sections. Account-scoped data still also needs per-account access.

shared.description: READ of payees, categories and tags is always allowed. These control create/edit/delete.

page.title: Settings

demoRestricted.heading: Restricted in Demo Mode
demoRestricted.body: Profile editing, password changes, two-factor authentication, and account deletion are disabled in demo mode.

sharedAccessCard.title: Shared Access
sharedAccessCard.description: Grant another person granular access to specific accounts.

emergencyAccessCard.title: Emergency Access
emergencyAccessCard.description: Designate contacts who automatically receive full access to your account if you do not sign in for an extended period.

aiSettingsCard.title: AI Settings
aiSettingsCard.description: Configure AI providers, manage API keys, and view usage statistics.

page.delegateSecurityError: Unable to load your security settings.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.subtitle: Configure AI providers for intelligent financial features

demoRestricted.heading: Restricted in Demo Mode
demoRestricted.body: AI provider configuration is disabled in demo mode.

sharedAccessPage.title: Shared Access
sharedAccessPage.subtitle: Grant another person granular access to specific accounts

demoRestricted.heading: Restricted in Demo Mode
demoRestricted.body: Delegate management is disabled in demo mode.

emergencyAccess.title: Emergency Access
emergencyAccess.subtitle: Designate contacts who automatically receive full access to your account if you do not sign in for an extended period
emergencyAccess.delegateRestricted: Emergency access can only be configured by the account owner.
emergencyAccess.demoRestricted: Emergency access is disabled in demo mode.

emailNotConfigured.heading: Email is not configured
emailNotConfigured.body: Emergency access depends on email delivery. Ask your administrator to configure the SMTP environment variables (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD) and try again.

alreadyGranted.heading: Emergency access already granted
alreadyGranted.description: your designated contacts received magic links to take over the account. If this was unintended, clear the granted state below to void outstanding links.

emergencyAccess.loadError: Unable to load emergency access settings.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.grantAfterDaysLabel: Days of inactivity before access is granted
settings.reminderAfterDaysLabel: Days of inactivity before reminder emails

message.heading: Message to your contacts
message.description: Encrypted at rest. Viewing or editing requires re-verifying your identity.
message.messagePlaceholder: Notes, instructions, locations of important documents...
message.maxCharsNote: Maximum 4000 characters. Stored encrypted at rest.

toasts.verifyAgain: Verification expired -- please verify again to save

contacts.heading: Emergency Contacts
contacts.description: Each contact receives a magic link by email when access is granted. They use it to set a new password and take over your account. The first contact to claim wins.

removeDialog.title: Remove contact
removeDialog.message: This contact will no longer receive emergency access. You can add them again later.

status.heading: Status
status.timerNote: The timer resets automatically any time you use the app -- signing in, viewing a page, recording a transaction, anything authenticated.

resetConfirm.title: Clear granted state
resetConfirm.message: This voids any outstanding magic links, lets the reminder cadence start again, and lets the grant cascade fire again after another period of inactivity.

stepUp.reason: Re-verify your identity to view or edit your emergency-access message.

aiProviders.heading: AI Providers
aiProviders.encryptionWarning: AI_ENCRYPTION_KEY is not configured. You can use Ollama (local, no API key needed) but cloud providers require encryption to store API keys securely.

systemDefault.heading: System Default AI Provider Available
systemDefault.description: A central AI provider has been configured by your administrator
systemDefault.usedAutomatically: It will be used automatically since you have no personal providers configured.
systemDefault.personalPriority: Your personal providers take priority over the system default.

noProviders.withSystemDefault: No personal AI providers configured. The system default provider will be used.
noProviders.withoutSystemDefault: No AI providers configured. Add a provider to enable AI features.

configForm.ollamaCloudNote: Model names must include the -cloud suffix (e.g. gpt-oss:20b-cloud).
configForm.priorityHelp: Lower number = higher priority. Used for fallback ordering.
configForm.costRatesHelp: Enter your provider's published rates per 1,000,000 tokens to see estimated cost on the Usage dashboard. Leave blank to skip cost estimates.
configForm.rateCurrencyHelp: If this differs from your home currency, the Usage dashboard can convert costs using your saved exchange rates.

usage.heading: Usage
usage.setRatesToEnable: Set rates on a provider to enable
usage.noUsage: No usage data yet. Usage will appear here once you start using AI features.
